title: Search by connect_board column

posts.author: rotem (Rotem Bar)
posts.cookedHtml:
i am using make.com (formally integromat) to search board with search items in board by column value with connect_boards column,
the search do not yelled anything even i have many items with connect_board values.
i have tried to search with the pulseid/itemid and nothing have been worked.
is this a known bug or i am missing something ?
Thanks

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @rotem

Welcome to the community! From what I understand you want to use “Items by Column Values”. The connect_boards column is not supported for this function. See https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/items-by-column-values-queries#supported-columns for a list of supported column types.
